name: ensembra
description: Multi-agent orchestrator plugin for Claude Code — agents perform in concert through a 5-phase pipeline (Gather → Deliberate → Execute → Audit → Document) with Reuse-First cross-cutting policy.

gemini_api_key.title: Gemini API key (stored in ~/.claude/settings.json — rotate if the file is shared)
gemini_api_key.description: Google AI Studio API key for the architect performer. Get a free key at https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey. Leave blank to disable Gemini — the architect will fall back to a Claude sub-agent automatically. STORAGE NOTE: Claude Code's sensitive-value OS-keychain path cannot be accessed from skill or agent content (confirmed against 2.1.109), so this field is intentionally non-sensitive and stored in plaintext under ~/.claude/settings.json (pluginConfigs.ensembra@ensembra.options.gemini_api_key). The file is in your private home directory but readable by any process running as your user. Rotate the key at https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey if your settings.json is ever shared or backed up to a cloud service.

ollama_endpoint.title: Ollama endpoint
ollama_endpoint.description: Ollama HTTP endpoint for the security and qa performers. Default: http://localhost:11434. Leave blank to skip Ollama — those performers will fall back to Claude sub-agents.
